content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves sharply to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on the right side of the track navigating through this left-hand curve — still on course.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 32, target = (32 + 5) % 121 = 37
- Target waypoint 37: (7.0234, 2.4062)
- Car: x=7.1019, y=1.6755, heading=72.90°
- dy = 2.4062 - 1.6755 = 0.7307
- dx = 7.0234 - 7.1019 = -0.0785
- bearing = atan2(0.7307, -0.0785) = 180° - atan2(0.7307, 0.0785) = 180° - 83.87° = 96.13°
- delta = 96.13° - 72.90° = +23.23°
- |delta| ≈ 23° → moderate left, use 15° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead and waypoint 37 is to the left of current heading (delta=+23.23°), continuing with 15° positive steering to follow the waypoint line through the left curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight heading east (~0°), then sharp right curve around WP26-38",
    "After right curve, track heads west/northwest then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is left of center (~0.18m) — acceptable entering left curve",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Delta around +22-23° through this curve — consistent moderate left correction needed",
    "After WP37+, heading will start decreasing (turning right/west) — prepare for negative steering",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used",
    "Car progressing smoothly through curve, heading increasing from 66° to 73°"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [7.048, 7.062, 7.076, 7.092, 7.102],
    "y": [1.393, 1.432, 1.482, 1.565, 1.675],
    "yaw": [56.58, 59.00, 61.37, 66.34, 72.90]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP37 at (7.023, 2.406): dy=0.731, dx=-0.079, bearing=96.13°, delta=+23.23° → moderate left, steer 15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
